subcodes.first_line: Thy petition hath attained unto the Most Holy Court, and the servant in attendance submitted it in its entirety. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: عریضه ات بساحت اقدس فائز و عبد حاضر تمام ان را عرض نمود طوبی از برای
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @piety; righteousness; fear of God [taqwa]
